title: Hornet Removal in New Hyde Park | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in New Hyde Park, Long Island. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving residential and commercial properties. Call now!
intro: New Hyde Park residents facing hornet infestations need fast, professional solutions to protect their families and properties. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive hornet removal services throughout New Hyde Park, from the tree-lined streets near Lakeville Estates to commercial properties along Jericho Turnpike. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests and prevent future infestations with proven methods tailored to Long Island's unique environment.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of specialized experience serving New Hyde Park and surrounding Long Island communities. Our licensed technicians understand the specific hornet species common to Nassau County and use safe, effective removal techniques that protect your property while ensuring complete nest elimination.
localContext: New Hyde Park's mature trees, historic homes, and proximity to parks like Shelter Rock Park create ideal nesting conditions for hornets, particularly in eaves, attics, and large shade trees. The area's mix of vintage residential properties and modern developments requires customized removal approaches to address hornet activity without damaging architectural features or landscaping.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal services in New Hyde Park. Our team can typically arrive within 2-4 hours for emergency situations. Complete nest removal usually takes 1-2 hours depending on nest size and location, with follow-up visits included if needed.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough property inspection, complete nest elimination, treatment of surrounding areas to prevent re-nesting, safe disposal of the nest, and a 30-day warranty. The price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height requiring specialized equipment.

faqs.question: Are hornet removal treatments safe for my family and pets in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and professional-grade equipment designed specifically for hornet removal. Our technicians follow strict safety protocols, and we provide clear instructions for any brief precautionary periods. Most families and pets can return to treated areas within 2-4 hours.

faqs.question: What hornet species are most common in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: New Hyde Park commonly sees bald-faced hornets and European hornets, both of which build large nests in trees, under eaves, and in attics. These species are particularly aggressive when defending their nests and can sting repeatedly, making professional removal essential for safety.
